title: psychotria guillauminiana
intro: Psychotria guillauminiana, also known as the Guillaumin's Psychotria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to New Caledonia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The leaves and stems of Psychotria guillauminiana have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some traditional practices, it is also used as a poultice or applied topically to the affected area.
